name: vscode-dap-dbgeng
description: Debug Adapter for WinDbg, a Windows native debugger. Provides support for debugging native applications and kernel drivers on Windows using the Debug Adapter Protocol.

target.description: Specifies the path to the executable to launch.

args.description: Specifies the command-line arguments to pass to the executable.

dbgengPath.description: Specifies the path to the dbgeng.dll library.

workingDir.description: Specifies the working directory for the debugged process.

verbosity.description: Specifies the verbosity level for debugger output. Valid values are debug, info, warn, error, and fatal.

sources.description: Specifies the list of source directory paths to include when resolving source files.

stopAtEntry.description: Break at the program entry point after launch. When false (the default), the adapter resumes the target after configurationDone.

trace.description: Optional path to record the DAP session to, for creating replay fixtures, e.g. '${workspaceFolder}/recordings/session.json'. Omit to disable tracing.

processId.description: The system process ID to attach to (for remote attach, the PID on the machine running dbgsrv). Set to "${command:dap-dbgeng.pickProcess}" to choose interactively at debug time; the picker lists local processes, or processes on the dbgsrv host when 'connectionString' is set.

connectionString.description: Remote connection string. For user-mode remote attach (with 'processId'), a dbgsrv process-server string, e.g. 'tcp:port=5005,server=HOST' (run 'dbgsrv -t tcp:port=5005' on the target). When 'kernel' is true, a kernel transport instead, e.g. 'net:port=50000,key=...' or 'com:pipe,port=\\.\pipe\kd,resets=0,reconnect'. Omit for local attach.

kernel.description: Set to true for kernel debugging; 'connectionString' is then interpreted as the kernel transport. Requires a target configured for kernel debugging (e.g. 'bcdedit /debug on').

dbgengPath.description: Specifies the path to the dbgeng.dll library.

workingDir.description: Specifies the working directory to use for the debug session.

verbosity.description: Specifies the verbosity level for debugger output. Valid values are debug, info, warn, error, and fatal.

sources.description: Specifies the list of source directory paths to include when resolving source files.

symbolPath.description: Specifies the list of symbol file paths to use when loading PDB files.

stopAtEntry.description: Break in immediately after attaching. When false, the adapter resumes the target after configurationDone instead of forcing a stop.

trace.description: Optional path to record the DAP session to, for creating replay fixtures, e.g. '${workspaceFolder}/recordings/attach.session.json'. Omit to disable tracing.
